meta.description: Editable text, labels and ownership guidance consumed by ILATE Lift v1.1.

global.label: Project Base (4.1)
global.owner: Edit lift type, speed, travel, stops, geometry base and control architecture only here.
global.output: Feeds traction/hydraulic logic, guides, buffers, 3D and report.

traction-params.label: Traction Setup
traction-params.owner: Edit traction geometry, suspension ratio, friction and acceleration only here.
traction-params.output: Feeds sheaves, traction checks and suspension verification.

suspension-params.label: Suspension Setup
suspension-params.owner: Edit ropes/belts, quantity, resistance and manufacturer preset only here.
suspension-params.output: Feeds safety factor, fatigue and discard checks.

buffers.label: Buffers (4.5)
buffers.owner: Edit buffer type, medium, stroke and manufacturer preset only here.
buffers.output: Validates impact energy, deceleration and admissible mass.

sil.label: Safety Circuits
sil.owner: Edit SIL, PFH, diagnostic coverage and fault tolerance only here.
sil.output: Shows if safety circuit architecture is acceptable.

memory.label: Calculation Memory
memory.owner: Generated evidence from validated inputs. Do not tune project values here.
memory.output: Preview of the final report structure.
